flu.name: Influenza
flu.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.

common_cold.description: A mild viral infection affecting the upper respiratory tract.

covid.description: An infectious disease caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

anxiety.description: A feeling of fear, tension, or worry that can interfere with daily life.

migraine.description: A neurological condition characterized by severe headaches.
